titleStmt.title: SII 4.273: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 273. (A.R. No. 44 of 1889). IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīviṭhaladēvaru
svasti . śrīvijayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavarṣa 1435 neya śrīmukhasaṁ
vacarada cayitra śudhapaṁcami śukra
varadalu śrīmanumahārājadhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīkruṣṇa
rāyamahārāyaru śrīviṭhaladēva
rige Amrutapaḍinaivēdyakke Aṁgaraṁgavai
bhōga pālguṇamāsada rathaUchsaha va
yiśākhamāsada ratha[Utsava]
chsaha pakṣaUtsava
paṇaṁ vi varāha
rādhane pu(ṁ)ṇya
pūje mahānaivēdya sa
ya māgaṇiya voḷagaṇa haḷi
hariharapurada grāma 1 hosaŪra maā
gaṇiya voḷagaṇa virupāpurada grāma
1 maḷalakoḍuke voḷagāda gōrikeḷaga
ṇa gadeya bījavari 1 . 0 paṁcaka
sīmeya voḷagaṇa gōpiseṭiya
haḷi grāma 1 Aṁtu grāma 3 gōrike
ḷagaṇa gade sahā yī grāmagaḷige saluva
taḷavāṟike suṁka jōḍi birāḍa sā(ṁ)mya
sakalasuvarṇaĀdāya sakalabhatta
Ādāya Ēnu Uṁṭādanu naṁ
ma taṁde narasaṇanāyakavoḍeya
rigeU naṁma tāyigaḷu nāgā
jidēviAṁmanavarigeU dharmmavāgi
sūryyagrahaṇapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū
sarvamānyavāgi Āceṁdrārkkastāyi
yāgi naḍeva mariyādēlu dhārāpū
rvakavāgi samarpisteŪ . śrīkruṣṇarā
yamahārāyara paṭadēviyaru
ci(ṁ)nnādēviA(ṁ)mmanavaru tirumala
dēviA(ṁ)mmanavaru śrīviṭhaladēvarige
gōpuragaḷanū kaṭisi dēvara nayi
vēdya Ārōgaṇeya citaisuvada
kke samarpista ci(ṁ)nnada harivāṇa
1 kaṁ baṁṇa 8 .... lekhadalū tū
ka ga 991 beḷiya nīrāṁjanada hali
ge 9 hiriya Ārati 8 puruṣāmra
kada Ārati 3 nāgārati 1 dhūpārati 1
kakhaḍibartiProbably this is meant forbatti.2 pratumeĀrati 1 Aṁ
tu Ārati 25 yī Ārati nīrāṁjanakuṁ
dīpārādhanegū samarpista hasuU 30 .
yiṁtī māḍida dharmavanū Acaṁ
drārkastāyi Āgi naḍeyaluḷadū .
yī dharmake Āru tappidavaru ta
ṁma taṁdetāyigaḷanū vāraṇāsi
yali koṁda pāpake hōharu gō
hatyabra(ṁ)hmahatyāpātakagaḷa māḍi
da pāpakke hōharū .
Digital edition of SII 4.273 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
